stemHtml: F-EAVX is outside Lille Approach's radio range. Fastair 144 is asked to relay a frequency change to Paris Control on 128.10. What does Fastair 144 transmit?

options.a: Fastair 144, relaying Lille Approach for F-EAVX, call Paris control 128.10.
options.d: Fastair 144, relaying Lille approach for F-EAVX, contact Paris control 128.10.
